title: Equality and diversity
body: "NISTA Diversity and Inclusion Group The Diversity and Inclusion Group at the National Infrastructure and Service Transformation Authority (NISTA) acts as the ‘champions’ for diversity and inclusion in NISTA, through active positive engagement with all staff to raise awareness of the subject and highlight and celebrate positive behaviours.  We link into existing networks for mutual support and help NISTA staff access wider Civil Service diversity and inclusion information. "
